briefs.title: Diagnose Windows Service Startup Failures with PowerShell
briefs.description: A practical PowerShell workflow for finding, diagnosing, and safely recovering Windows services that fail to start.
briefs.reader_goal: Find why a Windows service will not start, collect evidence, and choose a safe recovery action.

briefs.title: Understand Kubernetes CPU and Memory Requests and Limits
briefs.description: A practical guide to choosing Kubernetes resource requests and limits without creating avoidable scheduling or reliability problems.
briefs.reader_goal: Configure pod CPU and memory requests and limits, then recognize the operational tradeoffs behind those values.

sources.title: Resource Management for Pods and Containers
Assign CPU Resources to Containers and Pods
Assign Memory Resources to Containers and Pods

briefs.title: Check Kubernetes API Access Before Deploying with kubectl auth can-i
briefs.description: Use Kubernetes authorization checks to catch missing permissions before a deployment or operational task fails.
briefs.reader_goal: Verify Kubernetes API permissions safely, understand the result, and use it in deployment troubleshooting.
